text: Standing here, I sense the hum of intellect alive all around me. The sterile, modern design of the first space evokes anticipation—perhaps the quiet before ideas emerge. Moving to the second space, the vibrant "R + D" mural fills me with curiosity and excitement. There is an energy here, a celebration of human ingenuity and the drive to understand more, to innovate. Surrounded by screens, text, and tools, I feel the weight of discovery and the essential, restless urge of being human: to learn, to create, to connect. I am both small and significant in this temple of thought.
